calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281687 --event evt-petition-disposition && rg --files data/cases/scotus/73281687 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281687 --event evt-petition-disposition\nrg --files data/cases/scotus/73281687 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg --files record 2>/dev/null | sort || true\nfind . -path '*/record/context.json' -o -path '*/record/documents.json' -o -path '*/snapshots/*.json' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const hits = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|docket|citation|case law|legal/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));
text(hits);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate|relist|CVSG|Tenth Circuit|Paid|Term\" metrics/statpack.md | head -100\nwc -l metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":16000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"Jones v. United States\" \"Oath or affirmation\" hearsay warrant",filed_before:"2026-07-17",num_results:10,fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"]}); 
for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"firsthand knowledge\" \"Warrant Clause\" Jones hearsay",filed_before:"2026-07-17",num_results:20,fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url"]}); 
for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }
